entities.name: Vibe coding
entities.context: Coding approach without upfront planning; critiqued as unsustainable at scale

entities.name: Planning
entities.context: Upfront design work that prevents refactoring costs; framed as acceleration not delay

entities.name: Culture shift
entities.context: Required mindset change to view planning as acceleration rather than delay

relationships.context: Vibe coding is characterized by absence of planning; the two are positioned as opposites
Adopting planning requires a culture shift in how teams perceive upfront work
